title: senecio oleosus
intro: Senecio oleosus, also known as the gumweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio oleosus include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, and its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio oleosus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
